name: Camellia Metal Co., Ltd.
summary: Camellia Metal Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells steel bars and wires in Taiwan. It offers low-carbon, middle-carbon, high-carbon, free cutting, spring, alloy, and stainless steel bars and wires. The company's products are used in motor and mechanical axis, as well as axis of business machines; screwdrivers, hex wrenches, and sockets; torsion and balance bars, and automotive coil springs; and medical and aerospace technologies, household appliances, and high-precision and other materials. Its products are also used in cars, bridges, steel, and screws and other building materials; and electronics, telecommunications, and IT industries. The company was founded in 1971 and is based in Changhua County, Taiwan.
